title: .NET & Azure Consulting
tagline: Architecture, hands-on guidance, and code on high-stakes .NET and Azure platforms.
summary: With 15+ years in software design, I help you make the right architecture calls, scale your .NET/Azure platforms, and run technical audits.
highlights: Cloud-native architecture (App Service, Functions, Service Bus, Event Grid, Cosmos DB)
Code audits and progressive refactoring
Robust CI/CD (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions)
Observability strategy (Application Insights, structured logging)
Application security and secrets management (Key Vault, Managed Identity)
Multi-cloud working knowledge — Netlify, Vercel, Scaleway, CleverCloud, Infomaniak, OVHCloud when context steers away from Azure

useCases.title: SaaS platform audit and rebuild
useCases.description: Inventory, iterative refactoring plan, hands-on guidance through production.

useCases.title: Event-driven architecture design
useCases.description: Foundations for 10× growth, with Service Bus, Outbox patterns, and async projections.

faq.question: What's your daily rate?
faq.answer: On request, depending on scope, duration, and level of involvement.

faq.question: Remote work?
faq.answer: Yes, full-remote or hybrid. I occasionally travel to Lyon, Paris, Geneva and Fribourg.

faq.question: Legacy systems?
faq.answer: Yes. Audits and modernization plans are part of my day-to-day.

title: Tech Lead
tagline: I own the technical direction of a product team and help it grow.
summary: As a tech lead, I align product vision with technical decisions, frame structural choices, grow the team's skills, and keep quality on course.
highlights: Technical framing for new initiatives
Code reviews and pair programming
Individual and collective coaching
Direct collaboration with Product and Design
Ownership of delivery and quality indicators

useCases.title: Interim tech lead
useCases.description: Bridge the gap while you recruit, owning the technical direction of a product team.

useCases.title: Tech lead coaching
useCases.description: 3-to-6-month pairing to transfer practices, tooling, and posture to a new tech lead.

faq.question: What's your daily rate?
faq.answer: On request, depending on scope, duration, and level of involvement.

faq.question: Team size?
faq.answer: 3 to 10 people ideally; beyond that, we discuss structure.

faq.question: Do you hire?
faq.answer: I take part in technical interviews but don't own recruitment end-to-end.

title: Trainer
tagline: I train your teams on .NET, Azure, and modern web fundamentals and advanced practices.
summary: 3000+ hours of training delivered to developers and tech leads. Sessions tailored to your needs, hands-on exercises, post-training follow-up. Catalogue of 20 modules below.
highlights: ASP.NET Core and Blazor
Azure fundamentals and platform (AZ-204, AZ-400)
Pragmatic software architecture and patterns
Automated testing and TDD
DevOps and CI/CD
Vibe coding & AI — Claude Code, Copilot, MCP, on-prem AI

useCases.title: Inter-company 3-day training
useCases.description: Catalog sessions on Blazor, Azure DevOps, or Clean Architecture.

useCases.title: Bespoke in-house training
useCases.description: Program tailored with you after a needs-assessment.

faq.question: What's your training day rate?
faq.answer: 800 € — day rate × days delivered, or inter / in-house package depending on format.

faq.question: Remote training?
faq.answer: Yes, synchronous virtual classroom with pair exercises and live feedback.

faq.question: Certified?
faq.answer: Yes, Microsoft Certified Trainer and multiple Azure certifications.

title: Vibe-coding rollout
tagline: I help your team adopt Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, Antigravity — without blind trust in generated code.
summary: AI coding tools are reshaping developer workflows. I help you frame usage: which tools, which guardrails, which practices, how to measure gains — and most importantly, how to keep ownership of generated code quality.
highlights: Adoption of Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Antigravity + Gemini — tooling chosen for stack and constraints
Team-grade Claude Code config: skills, hooks, sub-agents, MCP, plugins, governance
Deep-review methodology for generated code — diff, reason, correct
CI guardrails: automated tests on AI PRs, security scans, prompt audit trail
Dev/lead coaching — from initial prompt to merge
Impact metrics (velocity, quality, satisfaction) before/after

useCases.title: Pilot with a willing team
useCases.description: 2-to-3-month framed pilot, debrief, and recommendation for scale-up.

useCases.title: Org-wide deployment
useCases.description: Rollout across the organization with best-practice guide and support structure.

useCases.title: AI-generated code audit
useCases.description: Detect anti-patterns, secure existing generations, put humans back in the loop.

faq.question: What's your day rate for vibe-coding work?
faq.answer: 800 € — these engagements are coaching and transmission, with significant time spent in pair-programming.

faq.question: Does it work on our stack?
faq.answer: Current tools are stack-agnostic. We validate on your code base together.

faq.question: Code confidentiality?
faq.answer: We pick a setup that fits your constraints (SaaS, self-hosted, zero-retention).

faq.question: Do you keep humans in the loop?
faq.answer: Yes — the promise isn't 'fewer devs', it's 'more effective devs who keep ownership'. Every generated line gets reviewed.

faq.question: How long for a pilot?
faq.answer: 4 to 6 weeks, team of 3 to 5 devs, measured deliverable.

title: AI for the enterprise
tagline: I bring AI in-house: local models, custom MCP servers, LLM-readable site, multi-platform analytics.
summary: Generative AI is reaching the enterprise. Stay sovereign with your data, build custom integrations, measure the impact. I cover four angles: on-prem AI (Ollama, vLLM, open-weight models), custom MCP servers, sites optimized for LLM consumption (llms.txt, structured data), and AI-aware analytics (Google, Bing, Meta).
highlights: On-premise AI — Ollama, vLLM, open-weight models (Llama, Qwen, Mistral)
Custom MCP servers — expose your IT systems to your devs' AI (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot)
LLM-readable site — llms.txt, ai.txt, enriched JSON-LD, AI-aware robots.txt
Multi-platform analytics — Google Analytics 4, Bing Webmaster, Meta Pixel, GDPR-compliant
Sovereignty & GDPR scoping — where prompts live, where data lives
European sovereign hosting available — Scaleway, OVHCloud, Infomaniak (GDPR-by-design)
Business impact metrics — AI KPIs in your existing dashboards

useCases.title: On-prem AI deployment
useCases.description: For a confidentiality-bound client: model selection, hardware sizing, internal tool integration.

useCases.title: Custom MCP server
useCases.description: Connect your IT systems or knowledge base to Claude Code / Cursor for compounded dev productivity.

useCases.title: AI-discoverability overhaul
useCases.description: llms.txt + JSON-LD + AI analytics for a B2B site that wants to surface in Perplexity / ChatGPT answers.

faq.question: What's your day rate?
faq.answer: 800 € — technical setup and coaching engagement.

faq.question: Why self-host AI rather than use ChatGPT/Claude?
faq.answer: Data sovereignty, GDPR / sector compliance, controlled recurring cost on heavy usage.

faq.question: Which models do you install?
faq.answer: Llama 3, Qwen, Mistral, Gemma — based on use case (coding, search, summarization) and available hardware.

faq.question: What's an MCP server, exactly?
faq.answer: A standardized connector between an AI and your tools: expose internal APIs, doc bases, business data — the AI uses them as functions.

faq.question: Will you touch our existing marketing pixels?
faq.answer: No — we extend. AI-aware events get added without breaking GA4 / Meta Pixel already in place.

title: Mobile app development
tagline: I design and build your iOS/Android apps with a single technical base.
summary: B2B and B2C mobile apps, cross-platform (.NET MAUI, Flutter depending on context). From mockup to store publishing.
highlights: Feasibility audit and tech choice
Mobile UX/UI and prototyping
Backend and companion APIs
Apple Store / Play Store publishing
Evolutive maintenance
Backend hosted on Azure or European alternative — Scaleway, OVHCloud, Infomaniak

useCases.title: B2B field app
useCases.description: Field app for agents, offline sync, IS integration.

useCases.title: Consumer app
useCases.description: Fast MVP, user-driven iterations, organic growth.

faq.question: Native iOS?
faq.answer: Yes when justified. By default I favor cross-platform for cost-efficiency.

faq.question: Who owns Apple/Google accounts?
faq.answer: You. I support creation and submissions.

title: Website development

summary: High-performance, SEO-optimized, accessible websites. From elegant showcase to complex business web apps, always on modern, maintainable tech.
highlights: Design system and layout
Blazor, ASP.NET Core, or the right stack
Technical SEO and Core Web Vitals
Azure hosting or equivalent
Handover training
Hosting matched to context — Azure, Netlify, Vercel, Scaleway, CleverCloud, Infomaniak or OVHCloud

useCases.title: Premium showcase site
useCases.description: Editorial site, strong identity, max performance — perfect for a brand.

useCases.title: Business web application
useCases.description: Customer portal, back-office, complex workflows, IS integrations.

faq.question: Do you design too?
faq.answer: On small projects yes. On identity-driven projects I collaborate with designers.

faq.question: Maintenance?
faq.answer: Maintenance contract or ad-hoc pricing, to suit your needs.
